capabilities.description: Run the daily 5-agent trading pipeline: scan, signal, risk, execute, monitor
Run a backtest with configurable parameters (timeframe, universe, SL/TP) using trading/src/backtest/engine.py
Monitor active positions for risk limits (max daily loss, max weekly loss, position sizing, kill switch)
Generate P&L report with positions, equity curve, Sharpe ratio, win rate, and risk events
Grid search and calibrate strategy parameters (SL/TP/threshold/lookback) to optimize Sharpe ratio

skills.description: Run a backtest: cd trading && python -m src.backtest.engine with configurable parameters
skills.returns: { sharpe: number, maxDrawdown: number, winRate: number, profitFactor: number, totalTrades: number, cagr: number }

skills.description: Run python trading/report.py to get current portfolio status and P&L
skills.returns: { portfolioValue: number, dailyPnl: number, weeklyPnl: number, openPositions: number, killSwitchActive: boolean }

skills.description: Check if the kill switch is active and why
skills.returns: { active: boolean, reason: string, activatedAt: string }
